name: ExtensionPaymentReconciliation_TenderedAmount
title: R5: Amount offered by the issuer (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `PaymentReconciliation.tenderedAmount` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`PaymentReconciliation.tenderedAmount` 0..1 `Money`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `PaymentReconciliation.tenderedAmount` 0..1 `Money`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `PaymentReconciliation.tenderedAmount` has a context of PaymentReconciliation based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `PaymentReconciliation`.
Element `PaymentReconciliation.tenderedAmount` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: R5: Amount offered by the issuer (new)
element.comment:
Element `PaymentReconciliation.tenderedAmount` has a context of PaymentReconciliation based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `PaymentReconciliation`.
Element `PaymentReconciliation.tenderedAmount` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.definition: The amount offered by the issuer, typically applies to cash when the issuer provides an amount in bank note denominations equal to or excess of the amount actually being paid.
